action.reasoning:
Observation: Major insight from iter 17 — agent_0_base_vel action range is [-20, 20], not [-1, 1]! I've been clipping at 1.0 the whole time, severely limiting Spot's speed. Best result still 53 safe steps. Need to test higher action magnitudes. Time tight: ~6.3h, 12 iters left, each eval ~18min so ~10 evals max.

Analysis: The fix is simple — scale up the action commands. But the env may have internal speed clipping (lin_speed config), so super-high values might just saturate. Need to test reasonable range. Also need to verify sign convention still holds with bigger commands. Let me write a clean predict.py with action range [-10, 10] and aggressive controller, then submit eval.

Decision: Write a clean, simple predict.py using compass directly (no fancy waypoints since simple was best), with action magnitudes scaled up 5-10x. Test sign once with diag if budget allows; otherwise just submit.
